text.text:
*Top Companies (5+)*
• Company 311: 15 ticket(s)
• Company 0: 10 ticket(s)
• Company 263: 3 ticket(s)
• Company 292: 3 ticket(s)

*Top Non-Maintenance Types (5+)*
• Email: 17
• Server / Updates: 10
• Identity / Access: 7
• General Support: 6

*Recurring Issue Patterns*
• Maintenance events represented 5 ticket(s) and are tracked separately from reactive support.
• Email appeared 17 time(s) in the current dataset.
• Server / Updates appeared 10 time(s) in the current dataset.

*Prevention Opportunities*
• Keep planned maintenance separate from reactive support in all daily analytics.
• Standardize ticket type tagging upstream to improve clustering quality.
• Include affected service or asset in the webhook payload to expose repeat infrastructure pain faster.

*Technician / Process Observations*
• Webhook response is now live and usable for production analysis.
• Company IDs only are preserved, making the report safer to share upward.

*Resolved Wins*
• Production webhook now returns usable data to the assistant.
• Daily scheduled lane and failure routing are in place.

*Sample Ticket Appendix*
• #28929 / Co 309 / 3rd Thursday - Church of Presentation Server Maintenance
• #28930 / Co 314 / 3rd Thursday - Center for Sight Server Maintenance
• #28931 / Co 320 / 3rd Thursday - Florsheim Homes
